name: Execulink Telecom
notes:
As of April 20, 2026, Execulink has shifted to a selective peering policy. In general one of the following criteria should be met in order to establish bilateral peering via an IX:

- We exchange an average of at least 10Mbit/s of traffic.
- We have an existing commercial relationship.
- Or you operate widely used internet infrastructure or services.

If you don't meet one of those criteria but feel that peering is warranted, please contact us.
